case_title: ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION VS WASHINGTON YVONNE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLIED TRADES CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,541.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,065.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $120.40 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $746.68 AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON YVONNE
